zh.Worthington, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃辛頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Worthington於1315年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃辛頓時，他的父親Henry De Worthington23歲，母親Mabel de Adlington25歲。他於大約1335年與Isabel de Blainscough結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1372年享年58歲。

zh-hans.Worthington, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾沃辛頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Worthington于1315年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃辛頓时，他的父亲Henry De Worthington23岁，母亲Mabel de Adlington25岁。他于大约1335年与Isabel de Blainscough结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1372年享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Worthington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire, Cheshire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from any of the places in Lancashire and Leicestershire named Worthington. The placenames probably derive from an Old English personal name Weorth + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
History: Nicholas Worthington emigrated from England to Old Saybrook, CT, c. 1650.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Worthington was born in 1315, in Worthington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry De Worthington, was 23 and his mother, Mabel de Adlington, was 25. He married Isabel de Blainscough about 1335. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1372, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Worthington est né en 1315, à Worthington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry De Worthington, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mabel de Adlington, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Blainscough environ 1335. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1372, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Worthington 1315 in Worthington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry De Worthington 23 und seine Mutter Mabel de Adlington 25. Er hat um 1335 Isabel de Blainscough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1372 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William De Worthington è nato il nel 1315 nel Worthington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry De Worthington, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Mabel de Adlington, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Blainscough circa 1335. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1372, all'età di 58 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William De Worthington(이)가 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워스잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry De Worthington(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel de Adlington(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1335년 Isabel de Blainscough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1372년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Worthington nasceu em 1315, em Worthington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry De Worthington, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mabel de Adlington, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Blainscough aproximadamente 1335. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1372, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Worthington родился в 1315 г. в местности вортингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry De Worthington было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel de Adlington, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Blainscough около 1335 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1372 г. в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William De Worthington nació en 1315, en Worthington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry De Worthington, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mabel de Adlington, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Isabel de Blainscough aproximadamente 1335. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1372, a la edad de 58 años.
